notes: Sprint 25 grooming 2026-05-05: 8 dev stories on sprint/sprint25-engine-telemetry. Theme: 'Restore the primary mission.' V0.24.1 closed the 9-drain ladder saga but engine-telemetry capture has been silently broken since Drive 5 (April 29). ApplicationOrchestrator._initializeConnection blocks orchestrator init thread for 27 hours (boot -1) / 82 minutes (boot 0); DriveDetector + OBD polling never start in time; both engine-on cycles (May 4 + May 5) captured zero data. Sprint 25 ships Spool's 6-story P0 spec (US-284 diagnose blocker; US-285 restore telemetry; US-286 e2e harness regression gate; US-287 startup_log writer; US-288 stage latching; US-289 battery_health_log column rename) + 2 opportunistic (US-290 TD-007 OLLAMA_GENERATE_TIMEOUT configurable; US-291 B-044 seed-script lint exempt -- fast-suite RED since 2026-05-01). 4M + 4S = 12 size-points. Anti-blocker discipline applied (paths verified; column-rename direction mandated upfront per BL-009; --check-feedback verifier active per US-282). Sprint 24 (5/5 SHIPPED V0.24.0 + V0.24.1 hotfix) prior. Next available: US-292.
